summary: Captured one frame from the node-scoped Hyprland output through ext-image-copy-capture using a GBM-allocated NVIDIA block-linear DMA-BUF on the advertised render node. The frame reached ready with size, format, modifier, timestamp, damage, and implicit protocol-ready synchronization recorded.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: One frame can be captured from the remote output.
Metadata includes size, format, modifier, timestamp, and sync mode.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validation-summary.json records 1920x1080, AR24, NVIDIA block-linear modifier, CLOCK_MONOTONIC timestamp, and implicit/protocol-ready sync.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: CPU readback is not claimed unless directly evidenced.

acceptanceEvidence.evidence: notes.md, validation-summary.json, direct-capture-frame.json, and lifecycle snapshots are under evidence/m2-capture-one-frame.

commandsRun.command: temporary GBM/Wayland direct capture probe against madobe-qd-m2-capture-one-frame
focused jq JSON validation, redaction scan, line check, and nix develop -c just verify
